category_sources: source_facts.description says macro assembler for Broadcom VideoCore IV aka Raspberry Pi GPU; official vc4asm docs describe assembler and disassembler with constraint checking.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vc4asm; official documentation title uses VC4ASM and command name vc4asm.
docs_sources: Official maazl.de vc4asm documentation provides the project overview, assembler usage, disassembler, build instructions, and assembler instruction reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/maazl/vc4asm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists vc4asm and vc4dis; source_facts.description and official docs identify Broadcom VideoCore IV/Raspberry Pi GPU macro assembler and disassembler.
